zh.Concelho de Fundão, Distrito de Castelo: 葡萄牙卡斯特略 布朗庫
zh.Baião, Porto, Portugal: 葡萄牙波爾圖白奧桑塔 萊奧卡迪亞
zh.Balocas, Freguesia de Covas, Concelho de: 葡萄牙可布拉巴洛卡斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pedro Nunes Ribeiro於大約1175年出生在葡萄牙可布拉巴洛卡斯時，他的父親Nuno Gomes Guedeão80歲，母親Maria Álvares de Rabaldes85歲。他和Maria Soares Velho至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1225年在葡萄牙卡斯特略 布朗庫享年52歲，埋葬在葡萄牙卡斯特略 布朗庫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pedro Nunes Ribeiro于大约1175年出生在葡萄牙可布拉巴洛卡斯时，他的父亲Nuno Gomes Guedeão80岁，母亲Maria Álvares de Rabaldes85岁。他和Maria Soares Velho至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1225年在葡萄牙卡斯特略 布朗庫享年52岁，埋葬在葡萄牙卡斯特略 布朗庫。

nameMeanings.name: Ribeiro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Fernando, Jorge, Americo, Mario, Armindo, Augusto, Julio, Luiz, Renato.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Albano, Vasco, Afonso, Agostinho, Almir, Amadeu, Guilherme, Henrique, Lidio.

Portuguese and Galician: from ribeiro ‘stream’, either a topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or a habitational name from any of several places called with this word. Compare Rebeiro and Rivero .

variants.name: Rebeiro
meanings: Altered form of Portuguese and Galician   Ribeiro  .

variants.name: Rivero
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jorge, Juan, Roberto, Carlos, Luis, Raul, Pedro, Ramon, Ricardo, Armando.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in Cantabria and Cáceres named Rivero, from ribero ‘bank, shore’ (from Late Latin riparium, a derivative of ripa ‘bank’).

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Nunes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Alberto, Domingos, Ricardo, Americo, Ana, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Guilherme, Aderito, Fernandes, Ilidio, Vasco, Zulmira.
Portuguese and Galician: patronymic from the personal name   Nuno  .

Jewish (Sephardic): Portuguese surname (see 1 above), adopted at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Nuno
meanings: Anglicized form of the Irish name Úna , assimilated to the name of the Roman goddess Juno, consort of Jupiter.

en.lifeSummary: When Pedro Nunes Ribeiro was born about 1175, in Balocas, Coimbra, Portugal, his father, Nuno Gomes Guedeão, was 80 and his mother, Maria Álvares de Rabaldes, was 85. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Maria Soares Velho. He died about 1225, in Castelo Branco, Portugal, at the age of 52, and was buried in Castelo Branco, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pedro Nunes Ribeiro est né environ 1175, à Balocas, Coimbra, Portugal, son père, Nuno Gomes Guedeão, avait 80 ans et sa mère, Maria Álvares de Rabaldes, avait 85 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Maria Soares Velho. Il est décédé environ 1225, à Castelo Branco, Portugal, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Castelo Branco, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pedro Nunes Ribeiro um 1175 in Balocas, Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nuno Gomes Guedeão 80 und seine Mutter Maria Álvares de Rabaldes 85. Er hatte mit Maria Soares Velho mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1225 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Castelo Branco, Portugal und wurde in Castelo Branco, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Nunes Ribeiro è nato il circa 1175 nel Balocas, Coimbra, Portogallo, il suo padre, Nuno Gomes Guedeão, aveva 80 anni e il suo madre, Maria Álvares de Rabaldes, aveva 85 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Maria Soares Velho. Morì circa 1225, nel Castelo Branco, Portogallo, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Castelo Branco, Portogallo.

ja.Concelho de Fundão, Distrito de Castelo: ポルトガルカステロ ブランコ
ja.Baião, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーベイaオサンタ レオクaディア
ja.Balocas, Freguesia de Covas, Concelho de: ポルトガルコインブラボーオカス
ja.lifeSummary: Pedro Nunes Ribeiroが約1175年にポルトガルコインブラボーオカスで生まれた時，父Nuno Gomes Guedeãoは80歳，母Maria Álvares de Rabaldesは85歳であった。彼はMaria Soares Velhoとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1225年にポルトガルカステロ ブランコで52歳で死去し，ポルトガルカステロ ブランコにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pedro Nunes Ribeiro(이)가 대략 1175년 포르투갈 코임브라 밸록아스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nuno Gomes Guedeão(은)는 80세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Álvares de Rabaldes(은)는 85세였다. 그는 Maria Soares Velho(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1225년 포르투갈 카스텔오 브랭코에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 카스텔오 브랭코에 묻혔다.

mg.ABT 1175–ABT 1225: tany ho any amin'ny 1175–tany ho any amin'ny 1225

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Nunes Ribeiro nasceu aproximadamente 1175, em Balocas, Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, Nuno Gomes Guedeão, tinha 80 anos e sua mãe, Maria Álvares de Rabaldes, tinha 85 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Maria Soares Velho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1225, em Castelo Branco, Portugal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Castelo Branco, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pedro Nunes Ribeiro родился около 1175 г. в местности балокас, коимбра, Португалия, его отцу по имени Nuno Gomes Guedeão было 80 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Álvares de Rabaldes, 85. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Maria Soares Velho. Он умер около 1225 г. в местности кастелоу бранко, Португалия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности кастелоу бранко, Португалия.

sm.ABT 1175–ABT 1225: e tusa o le 1175–e tusa o le 1225

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pedro Nunes Ribeiro nació aproximadamente 1175, en Balocas, Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, Nuno Gomes Guedeão, tenía 80 años y su mamá, Maria Álvares de Rabaldes, tenía 85 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Maria Soares Velho. Murió aproximadamente 1225, en Castelo Branco, Portugal, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Castelo Branco, Portugal.
